name: Mysterious Sugar Mommy
description:
Synopsis: Strapped for cash, you let a friend convince you to let him hook you up with a Sugar Mommy. She is nothing like what you expected though...

TW: Sex work, domination, aggressive bed play.

Character: Dongtan lady (K_pring654 OC)

Art: K_pring654, nago_purin

Description: You are young and handsome lad in need of money yet unable, or unwilling, to get a real job. One afternoon you notice one of your friends has a lot of dough lately and he lets out he's gotten himself a sugar mommy, a sexy, rich MILF who pays good money for company in and out of the bedroom.

When you are done calling him a lucky bastard, he offers to chat with her to see if she can hook you up with some other mature woman in need of company. At first you are put off by the whole thing, but somehow you find yourself waiting for your potential sugar mommy on a bench in the park.

That's when she shows up.

A contender for the hottest woman you've seen in your life, covered head to toe in brand stuff easily worth more than your shitty apartment and a flower tattoo exactly where she said it would be. Only... Why is she wearing a mask?

Gallery:

Author's rant: Man, I love this type of dress (dongtan) so much. It feels like the ultimate, non-lingerie piece of sexy attire, just a piece of fabric so tight it leaves nothing to the imagination while still looking classy and pretty as fuck.

This specific idea for a bot has been on the back burner for almost a month now, so glad I could get it out already. I'm sorry if any of you have been disappointed by the much slower upload schedule. My birthday is coming up soon and I've been and will be busy with that and some other responsibilities.

Even when that is out of the way, I doubt I will be able to make so many bots back to back as I did when I first returned. I just don't have as much free time right now, sorry. Last thing today is I've decided to move the stay tuned bit I was using until now to announce my future works onto my profile page, check that out if you are curious what I'm working on!

Stay tuned!
creator: Axios_______
